title: Wolfy Doggos!
body:
Have you ever thought that tamed wolf eyes looked a little off? 

Well me too, and now here's a solution!
This pack adjusts the eyes of tamed wolves to be the same as their wild counterparts. It also includes all of the new vanilla variants!

Pretty simple, but I hope you enjoy!

Optifine NOT required




<details>
<summary>Terms of Use</summary>

- Feel free to use this in videos and such, just give me a shoutout or link back to this post in the description.
- You may include it in mod packs or use it on servers, just give credit when appropriate.
- Don't redistribute without my permission.
- I may adjust these terms and conditions in time as needed

</details>
